description: Fix new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted') with no category in supabase-api.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/supabase && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace new ToolError('aborted') with ToolError.timeout() in supabase-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/supabase/src/supabase-api.ts, the catch block at lines 88-89 throws `new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted')` with no category. Replace with ToolError.timeout().
acceptanceCriteria: The `new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted')` at line 89 is replaced with ToolError.timeout('Request was aborted') in supabase-api.ts
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/supabase/src/supabase-api.ts (lines 88-89)

Context:
Lines 88-89:
  if (err instanceof DOMException && err.name === 'AbortError') throw new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted');

Change to:
  if (err instanceof DOMException && err.name === 'AbortError') throw ToolError.timeout('Request was aborted');

The 'network_error' case below correctly sets category:'internal' — leave unchanged.
